abort.no_ha_devices: No Home Assistant devices available for linking.
abort.no_unlinked_hb_items: No unlinked HomeBox items with tag HomeAssistant were found.

error.invalid_auth_homebox: Login failed. Verify the HomeBox URL and port (often :7745 or Docker-mapped :3100), and confirm the username/password are correct for HomeBox local login.
error.link_conflict: Link conflict: this ha_device or hb_item is already linked.
error.unlink_conflict: Unlink conflict: the selected link no longer matches current mapping.

data_description.area: Select an existing Home Assistant room to suggest for the HomeBox device
data_description.host: URL or hostname of your HomeBox instance. Common ports are 7745 (default) or 3100 (common Docker mapping), for example: http://homebox.local:3100
data_description.name: Device name shown in Home Assistant (default: HomeBox)
data_description.username: Username or email of your HomeBox account

abort.no_unlinked_hb_items: No unlinked HomeBox items with tag HomeAssistant were found.

error.unlink_conflict: Unlink conflict: the selected link no longer matches current mapping.
